---
title: 无法通过9300端口连接远程es集群
date: 2019-01-30 18:00:50.0
updated: 2019-01-30 18:03:16.0
url: /archives/524
categories: 
tags: java | elasticsearch | 9300 | vm.max_map_count | NoNodeAvailableException[None of the configured nodes are available
---

<div>问题描述： 利用docker在远程主机上部署了一套es节点，在本地电脑上可以通过kibana连接成功，访问ip:9200可以访问成功，通过java客户端连接9300端口，操作失败报错内容为：</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="1843-1548841750143" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">NoNodeAvailableException[None of the configured nodes are available: [{#transport#-1}{o_MdofxbQCiafOWQNe0dVQ}{ip}{123.206.xxx.xxx:9300}] ]</div></blockquote>

<div></div>

<div>解决：</div>

<div>1. 通过telnet ip 9300发现网络不通。elasticsearch连接远程服务器需要设置network.address参数。修改elasticsearch.yml将network.address设置为0.0.0.0</div>

<div>
<blockquote>
<div>network.address: 0.0.0.0</div></blockquote>
</div>

<div>增加该配置后，启动docker 报错：</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="3638-1548841743903" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">max virtual memory areas vm.max_map_count [65530] likely too low, increase to at least [262144]</div></blockquote>

<div></div>

<div>解决：</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="6459-1548841740044" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">sudo sysctl -w vm.max_map_count=655360</div></blockquote>

<div></div>

<div>并用以下命令查看是否修改成功</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="5411-1548841735683" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">sysctl -a | grep “vm.max_map_count”</div></blockquote>

<div>修改配置文件</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="2694-1548841727789" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">sudo vim /etc/sysctl.conf</div></blockquote>

<div>加入：</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="1387-1548841762038" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">vm.max_map_count=262144</div></blockquote>

<div></div>

<div>docker启动成功后，通过java客户端连接依然报错</div>

<blockquote>
<div id="2746-1548841836804" data-theme="default" data-language="javascript">NoNodeAvailableException[None of the configured nodes are available: [{#transport#-1}{o_MdofxbQCiafOWQNe0dVQ}{ip}{123.206.xxx.xxx:9300}] ]</div></blockquote>

<div></div>

<div>原来在java代码中使用嗅探技术，java客户端会去嗅探es集群中的所有节点以便客户端使用，但在嗅探时发生错误造成操作失败。ps：为什么会嗅探失败暂未解决。</div>

<div></div>

<div>解决：</div>

<div>修改java代码将嗅探关闭，采用手动添加节点的方式后操作成功。</div>

<div>java代码：</div>

<blockquote>
<div>
<pre>@PostConstruct
public void initialize() throws Exception {
    Settings esSettings = Settings.builder()
            .put("cluster.name", esClusterName)
            // TODO 关闭网络嗅探 ，自动嗅探时会报错 原因没搞明白
            .put("client.transport.sniff", false).build();
    client = new PreBuiltTransportClient(esSettings);
    String[] esHosts = esHost.trim().split(",");
    // 循环添加配置中的各个es节点
    for (String host : esHosts) {
        client.addTransportAddress(new InetSocketTransportAddress(InetAddress.getByName(host),
                esPort));
    }
}</pre>
</div></blockquote>

<div></div>

<div>参考文章：<a href="https://blog.csdn.net/Gamer_gyt/article/details/52960941">https://blog.csdn.net/Gamer_gyt/article/details/52960941</a></div>

<div><a href="https://blog.csdn.net/kevinxxw/article/details/62091142">https://blog.csdn.net/kevinxxw/article/details/62091142</a></div>

<div>项目源码：<a href="https://github.com/iqijun/elasticsearchDemo">https://github.com/iqijun/elasticsearchDemo</a></div>

<!--5f39ae17-8c62-4a45-bc43-b32064c9388a:-->
